creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
Created attachment 165491
Diff patch between current port version and upgrade to v2.3.5

Simple update to latest version. Only had to change version numbers and checksums in Makefile and distinfo, and a few additional files added to pkg-plist.

NOTE: this should be committed together with a devel/sope update, the PR of which is 206188.
